publishedAbstract: - Facing the following error when the heketi pod starts: `Fail to pull image rhgs3/rhgd-volmanager-rhel7:v3.11.3 rpc error repository docker.io/rhgs3/rhgd-volmanager-rhel7:v3.11.3 not found: does not exist or no pull access`.
publishedTitle: Failed to pull image while deploying heketi pod
